title: citrus obovata
intro: Citrus obovata, also known as the kumquat or Chinese kumquat, is a small evergreen shrub or tree native to southern China. The medicinal properties of Citrus obovata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of consuming Citrus obovata include its potential to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant properties. Citrus obovata is often prepared for herbal use by drying the fruits, leaves, and twigs, which can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions to promote overall well-being.
